ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., CURRENT, SAVINGS) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Individual, Corporate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "initiator_type" TEXT /* Type of initiator (e.g., ACCOUNT-HOLDER, SYSTEM) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Value of the transaction (positive for deposits, negative for withdrawals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiators" (
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiator */,
  "initiator_type" TEXT /* Type of initiator (e.g., ACCOUNT-HOLDER, SYSTEM) */,
  "initiator_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiator type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction related to the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., 'Created', 'Updated') */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account associated with the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was associated with the account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-account association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Transaction Alert, Fraud Alert) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
